# steel-analyzer-automation

Automated steel structure analysis pipeline. Accepts raw project files from Google Drive, runs Gemini-based extraction, generates Excel workbooks, performs Claude QA review, uploads verified artifacts back to Drive, and publishes run summaries to a static dashboard.

## Stack

- Runtime: Node.js (ESM, `"type": "module"`)
- Key libraries: `exceljs ^4.4.0`, `googleapis ^171.4.0`, `grammy` (Telegram)
- Dashboard: static Vercel app via `@vercel/static`
- No n8n in this pipeline

## Architecture

```
telegram-bot.mjs (/run command, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID gate)
  -> pipeline-runner.mjs (runPipeline)
      -> steel-drive.mjs download (User OAuth, MD5-verified)
      -> llm-dispatcher.mjs (dispatchGeminiAnalysis via spawnSync gemini)
          -> steel-analysis-prompt.mjs (buildAnalysisPrompt)
          -> workbook-generator.mjs (JSON -> 3 xlsx)
          -> artifact-verifier.mjs (output check)
      -> dispatchClaudeQA (stub in Sprint 10, auto-ACCEPTED)
      -> Telegram inline buttons: approve_upload / reject_upload
  -> steel-drive.mjs upload (owner-approval token required)
  -> publish-run.mjs (writes dashboard/runs JSON, updates index, git pull/add/commit/push)

Failure publishing:
- Pipeline crashes publish a failed dashboard entry with the crash message.
- Upload failures publish a failed dashboard entry with the upload error.
- Owner rejections log steel.upload-rejected.v1 and publish a failed dashboard entry.

steel-orchestrator.mjs (file-bus watcher, PM2) -- parallel long-running process
ecosystem.config.cjs -- PM2 config: steel-bot + steel-orchestrator; steel-bot receives GITHUB_TOKEN for dashboard push credentials
dashboard/ -- static Vercel app loading dashboard/runs/index.json and per-run JSON files
```

## Key Commands

```bash
# Run tests
cd agent-core && npm test

# Drive operations
node agent-core/scripts/steel-drive.mjs list --run <id> --folder <folder_id>
node agent-core/scripts/steel-drive.mjs download --run <id> --folder <folder_id>
node agent-core/scripts/steel-drive.mjs upload --run <id> --folder <folder_id> \
  --file <path> --owner-approval "I_APPROVE_STEEL_UPLOAD:<run_id>:<folder_id>"

# Orchestrator
node agent-core/scripts/steel-orchestrator.mjs
node agent-core/scripts/steel-orchestrator.mjs status
node agent-core/scripts/steel-orchestrator.mjs init <run_id> <project_name> <delivery_mode>

# PM2
GITHUB_TOKEN=<token with push access> pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
pm2 logs steel-bot
pm2 restart steel-bot
```

## File Map

```
ecosystem.config.cjs                  PM2 config: steel-bot + steel-orchestrator + agent-tasks-daemon
.env.example                          documents GITHUB_TOKEN for dashboard auto-publish
dashboard/
  index.html                          static Vercel run history/detail UI (608 lines)
  runs/index.json                     published run summary index
  vercel.json                         @vercel/static config with no-cache run JSON headers
agent-core/
  package.json                        npm root (steel-agent-core)
  scripts/
    steel-drive.mjs                   Drive wrapper (799 lines)
    steel-orchestrator.mjs            File-bus watcher (843 lines)
  src/
    telegram-bot.mjs                  grammy bot, /run /status /cancel + approve/reject + dashboard publish (208 lines)
    pipeline-runner.mjs               runPipeline(): download -> analysis -> QA -> approval (90 lines)
    llm-dispatcher.mjs                dispatchGeminiAnalysis() via spawnSync gemini (81 lines)
    publish-run.mjs                   publishRun(): writes dashboard/runs JSON, git pull/commit/push with Basic auth GITHUB_TOKEN, step-aware rollback on failure (161 lines)
    prompts/
      steel-analysis-prompt.mjs       buildAnalysisPrompt() for Gemini (33 lines)
    workbook-generator.mjs            JSON -> xlsx via ExcelJS (341 lines)
    artifact-verifier.mjs             Output directory checker (60 lines)
  steel-bus/
    lib/state-machine.mjs             Pure state machine, 17 states
    lib/gepa-register.mjs             GEPA proposal tracking
    inbox/                            Signal drop zone (runtime)
    runs/                             Per-run state dirs (runtime, not committed)
    dead-letter/                      Failed signal archive (runtime)
  schemas/                            JSON schemas for all bus signals
  test/                               *.test.mjs, including publish-run and telegram-bot dashboard publish tests
  agent-tasks/
    bin/pos-daemon.mjs               PM2 entrypoint for agent-tasks daemon
    bin/pos-dispatch.mjs             Manual dispatch CLI (--replay for dead-letter)
    lib/adapters.mjs                 codex/gemini/claude adapters, injectSentinel, parseVerdict (last-match)
    lib/daemon.mjs                   Poll loop (5s), atomic claim, orphan recovery, priority sort
    lib/task-schema.mjs              Ajv schema validator for pos.task.v1
    lib/result-schema.mjs            Ajv schema validator for pos.result.v1
    schemas/pos.task.v1.json         Task schema (dry_run, deadline_at, priority, timeout_sec)
    schemas/pos.result.v1.json       Result schema (verdict, findings, gepa_proposal optional)
    queue/                           Task input queue (drop task JSON here)
    running/                         In-flight tasks
    results/                         Completed task results (result.json + result.md)
    dead-letter/                     Failed tasks (3 attempts exceeded or deadline expired)
docs/
  superflow/specs/                    Feature specs
  superflow/plans/                    Sprint plans
  handoffs/                           Cross-runtime handoff notes
  operations/                         Runbooks
```

## State Machine States

`requested` -> `sources_manifested` -> `sources_downloaded` -> `extraction_done` -> `workbooks_generated` -> `workbooks_validated` -> `producer_handoff_done` -> `claude_review_requested` -> `claude_review_passed` | `claude_review_blocked` -> `codex_integration_requested` -> `codex_integration_done` -> `gepa_proposed` -> `gepa_reviewed` -> `upload_ready` -> `uploaded_verified` -> `closed` | `dead_letter`

<!-- sprint:12 -->
<!-- updated-by-superflow:2026-05-25 -->
